translations.en: It’s expensive, to be sure, but sturdy.
translations.de: Es ist teuer, zugegeben, aber robust.
translations.nl: Het is duur, toegegeven, maar stevig.
translations.hi: महंगा है, हाँ, पर मज़बूत है.
translations.nb: Det er dyrt, riktig nok, men solid.
translations.sv: Det är dyrt, visst, men robust.
translations.ro: Este scump, ce-i drept, dar rezistent.
translations.cs: Je to drahé, sice, ale pevné.
translations.da: Det er dyrt, bevares, men solidt.
translations.fi: Se on kallis, totta, mutta tukeva.
translations.ja: 高いのは確かだけど、頑丈だ。

tokens.explanation: Copular verb form 'est' with elided clitic pronoun 'ce' (C’); links to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective complement of the copula; describes the subject.
Concessive adverb acknowledging a point before introducing contrast.
Coordinating conjunction introducing a contrasting remark.
Predicate adjective (elliptical after 'mais'); supplies a positive counterpoint.

sentences.target: Tu as raison, certes, mais pas entièrement.
sentences.reading: /ty a ʁɛzɔ̃ sɛʁt mɛ pa ɑ̃tjɛʁmɑ̃/

translations.fr: Tu as raison, certes, mais pas entièrement.
translations.ipa: /ty a ʁɛzɔ̃ sɛʁt mɛ pa ɑ̃tjɛʁmɑ̃/
translations.en: You’re right, to be sure, but not entirely.
translations.es: Tienes razón, sí, pero no del todo.
translations.de: Du hast recht, zugegeben, aber nicht ganz.
translations.it: Hai ragione, certo, ma non del tutto.
translations.ko: 네 말이 맞긴 하지만 완전히는 아니야.
translations.zh-Hans: 你说得对，确实，不过不完全。
translations.yue: 你講得啱，係嘅，但唔係完全啱。
translations.ru: Ты прав, конечно, но не полностью.
translations.pt: Você tem razão, sim, mas não totalmente.
translations.he: אתה צודק, נכון, אבל לא לגמרי.
translations.vi: Bạn nói đúng, đúng là vậy, nhưng chưa hoàn toàn.
translations.ar: أنت على حق، صحيح، لكن ليس تمامًا.
translations.nl: Je hebt gelijk, toegegeven, maar niet helemaal.
translations.uk: Ти маєш рацію, звісно, але не повністю.
translations.hu: Igazad van, persze, de nem teljesen.
translations.hi: तुम सही हो, हाँ, लेकिन पूरी तरह नहीं.
translations.pl: Masz rację, owszem, ale nie do końca.
translations.el: Έχεις δίκιο, βέβαια, αλλά όχι εντελώς.
translations.nb: Du har rett, riktignok, men ikke helt.
translations.id: Kamu benar, memang, tapi tidak sepenuhnya.
translations.sv: Du har rätt, visst, men inte helt.
translations.ro: Ai dreptate, ce-i drept, dar nu în totalitate.
translations.cs: Máš pravdu, sice, ale ne úplně.
translations.da: Du har ret, bevares, men ikke helt.
translations.fi: Olet oikeassa, totta, mutta et täysin.
translations.ja: あなたは確かに正しいけど、完全ではない。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb in the idiom 'avoir raison' (to be right).
Object noun in the idiom 'avoir raison', yielding the meaning 'to be right'.
Concessive adverb marking acknowledgement.
Coordinating conjunction introducing contrast.
Negation adverb; scopes over the following adverb ('entièrement').
Degree/manner adverb; modified by 'pas' to mean 'not entirely'.

sentences.target: On avance, certes, mais doucement aujourd’hui.

translations.fr: On avance, certes, mais doucement aujourd’hui.
translations.en: We’re making progress, to be sure, but slowly today.
translations.es: Vamos avanzando, sí, pero despacio hoy.
translations.de: Wir kommen voran, zugegeben, aber heute nur langsam.
translations.it: Stiamo facendo progressi, certo, ma oggi lentamente.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们确实在取得进展，但今天很慢。
translations.yue: 我哋係有進展，但今日好慢。
translations.ru: Мы продвигаемся, конечно, но сегодня медленно.
translations.pt: Estamos avançando, sim, mas hoje devagar.
translations.he: אנחנו מתקדמים, נכון, אבל היום לאט.
translations.vi: Chúng ta đang tiến triển, đúng là vậy, nhưng hôm nay chậm.
translations.ar: نحرز تقدماً، صحيح، لكن اليوم ببطء.
translations.nl: We gaan vooruit, toegegeven, maar vandaag langzaam.
translations.uk: Ми просуваємося, звісно, але сьогодні повільно.
translations.hi: हम प्रगति कर रहे हैं, हाँ, लेकिन आज गति धीमी है.
translations.pl: Posuwamy się naprzód, owszem, ale dziś powoli.
translations.nb: Vi gjør fremskritt, riktig nok, men i dag går det sakte.
translations.id: Kami memang membuat kemajuan, tapi hari ini pelan.
translations.sv: Vi går framåt, visst, men i dag går det långsamt.
translations.ro: Avansăm, ce-i drept, dar astăzi încet.
translations.da: Vi gør fremskridt, bevares, men i dag går det langsomt.
translations.ja: 確かに進んでいるけど、今日はゆっくりだ。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun (often colloquial 'we').
Intransitive main verb meaning to progress or move forward.
Concessive adverb acknowledging progress.
Coordinating conjunction introducing a contrast.
Manner adverb modifying 'avance' (how the action proceeds).
Temporal adverb specifying the time of the action.

sentences.target: Il est bon, certes, mais trop sucré.
sentences.reading: /il ɛ bɔ̃ sɛʁt mɛ tʁo sykʁe/

translations.fr: Il est bon, certes, mais trop sucré.
translations.ipa: /il ɛ bɔ̃ sɛʁt mɛ tʁo sykʁe/
translations.en: It’s good, to be sure, but too sweet.
translations.es: Está bueno, sí, pero demasiado dulce.
translations.de: Er ist gut, zugegeben, aber zu süß.
translations.it: È buono, certo, ma troppo dolce.
translations.ru: Он хороший, конечно, но слишком сладкий.
translations.pt: Está bom, sim, mas doce demais.
translations.he: זה טעים, נכון, אבל מתוק מדי.
translations.ar: هو جيد، صحيح، لكنه شديد الحلاوة.
translations.nl: Het is lekker, toegegeven, maar te zoet.
translations.uk: Він смачний, звісно, але надто солодкий.
translations.hi: स्वाद अच्छा है, हाँ, पर बहुत मीठा है.
translations.pl: Jest smaczny, owszem, ale zbyt słodki.
translations.el: Είναι καλό, βέβαια, αλλά υπερβολικά γλυκό.
translations.nb: Den er god, riktig nok, men for søt.
translations.sv: Den är god, visst, men för söt.
translations.ro: Este bun, ce-i drept, dar prea dulce.
translations.cs: Je to dobré, sice, ale příliš sladké.
translations.da: Den er god, bevares, men for sød.
translations.fi: Se on hyvä, totta, mutta liian makea.
translations.ja: おいしいのは確かだけど、甘すぎる。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular subject pronoun.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective complement of the copula.
Concessive adverb acknowledging the preceding evaluation.
Coordinating conjunction introducing a contrast.
Degree adverb intensifying the following adjective.
Adjective; contrasted predicate indicating excessive sweetness.
